executive_summary: Build workflow execution failed due to missing or inaccessible workflow configuration file. The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) could not be found in the repository, preventing any build execution. This is a critical configuration error that must be resolved before any Maven build can be attempted.

errors.title: Workflow Configuration File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository or is not accessible with the current permissions.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow configuration file is missing from the repository at the expected path .github/workflows/build.yml, or the GitHub Actions feature is disabled for this repository, or the authentication token lacks the necessary workflow permissions.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created and properly configured. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment processes.

steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory structure in the repository
2. Add build.yml workflow file with proper Maven build configuration
4. Define build jobs with Maven commands (clean, compile, test, package)
5. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
6. Ensure authentication token has workflow write permissions

errors.title: Empty Action URL - No Build Execution
errors.description: The action_url field is empty in all build failure logs, indicating that no GitHub Actions workflow run was ever initiated. This confirms that the workflow dispatch request failed before any build could start.
errors.error_message: action_url field is empty - no workflow run was created
errors.root_cause: The workflow dispatch API call failed with 404 before creating a workflow run, resulting in no action URL being generated.
errors.impact: No build logs are available for analysis. Cannot perform Maven error classification without actual build execution.

steps: 2. Validate YAML syntax of workflow file
4. Verify repository Actions settings allow workflow runs
5. Test workflow dispatch with valid authentication

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure classified as CONFIGURATION_ERROR due to missing workflow file. No Maven build was executed. Requires immediate remediation to establish CI/CD pipeline.
compliance_notes.security_impact: LOW - No code execution occurred. Configuration issue only.
compliance_notes.sla_impact: Build pipeline completely non-functional. Immediate action required.

next_steps: 2. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for repository
4. Re-run build automation after workflow file is in place

automated_remediation.description: Automated script to create standard Maven build workflow file with proper configuration
